creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
On Sat, 19 Dec 2009 16:45:22 +0000 (GMT)
pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: port graphics/tiff: tiff2pdf tints images with wrong colors
> when converting (any tiff version newer than 3.8.0)
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Sat Dec 19 16:39:37 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Submitter claims the problem persists -- personally I don't see any
> different between original TIFF and "bad" PDF tiger.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=110826

Do you not see that the colors are wrong? Not implying anythiong about
your eyes, but with my eyes, the colors of the pdf's of the tiger are
like this:
background: has a red tint to it (on the original it is light grey)
eyes: red (original: green)
orange part of head: magenta'ish
black stripes: bluish / greenish

 Have you trioed to open the pdf files with both acroread and
xpdf?

HTH
-- 
Regards,
Torfinn Ingolfsen
